overview.description: The Allspring Ultra Short Municipal ETF (AUSM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is actively managed, investing in a portfolio of ultra-short term municipal securities with investment grade ratings. The fund combines top-down and bottom-up research for security selection. AUSM was launched on Jul 7, 2025 and is issued by Allspring.
